name: Galaxy Z Flip 5 Heavy-Duty Case
description: Military-grade protection for Galaxy Z Flip 5. Built for extreme conditions.
fullDescription: Heavy-duty protection for Galaxy Z Flip 5. Features include dual-layer construction (PC + TPU), reinforced corners, and raised edges for screen and camera protection. Military-grade drop tested (MIL-STD-810H).
